assertions.description: The iCE40-IO gerber set contains all 9 expected layers (F.Cu, B.Cu, F/B Mask, F/B Paste, F/B SilkS, Edge.Cuts) plus one drill file. All layers have correct X2 FileFunction attributes. Gerber/drill alignment is confirmed. Board dimensions (45x50mm) match the PCB analyzer output. The F.SilkS layer extents (59.1 x 63.1mm) exceed the board boundary, which is normal for silkscreen text/logos placed outside the board edge.
